name: OrganiGram Holdings, Inc.
description: Organigram Global is a leading Canadian cannabis company dedicated to redefining the industry through innovation, high-quality consumer brands, and a growing international presence. The company utilizes a scientific approach, cutting-edge technology, and data-driven insights to develop a diverse portfolio of products, including popular brands such as SHRED, BOXHOT, Big Bag o’ Buds, and Edison. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Organigram is committed to responsible regulation, consumer education, and shifting perceptions to integrate cannabis into everyday life while expanding its reach beyond Canada through strategic investments and partnerships.
